parameters.description: Relay messages to your own Discord channel through the UnitySVC gateway. POST a native Discord webhook payload (e.g. {"content": "..."} or {"embeds": [...]}); the gateway composes your webhook URL from your stored secrets and forwards it. The free byok channel uses your own stored webhook; the plus channel binds extra per-enrollment webhooks via parameters.
parameters.plus_base_url: ${ secrets.DISCORD_WEBHOOK_BASE ?? https://discord.com/api/webhooks }/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.webhook_id_secret }} }/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.webhook_token_secret }} }

webhook_id_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Discord webhook id

webhook_token_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Discord webhook token
